mapper.select:
SELECT book.id, book.title, book.cover, book.description, book.price, book.original_price, book.sub_count, book.level, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tag.tag_name) AS tag_names, IFNULL(ubr.purchase_count, 0) AS purchaseCount FROM osh_book book LEFT JOIN osh_book_tag tag ON book.id = tag.book_id AND tag.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM osh_user_book_relation WHERE purchased = 1 AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY book_id ) ubr ON book.id = ubr.book_id
book.del_flag = '0' and book.status = '0'
and tag.tag_name in
#{tagName}
and book.title like concat('%', #{reqVO.title}, '%')
and book.level = #{reqVO.level} and #{reqVO.userLevel} >= #{reqVO.level}
and (book.level <= #{reqVO.userLevel} or book.level is null)
GROUP BY book.id ORDER BY purchaseCount DESC, book.sub_count DESC, book.create_time DESC

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description AS `desc`, b.price, b.original_price AS tPrice, b.sub_count AS subCount, GROUP_CONCAT(bt.tag_name) AS tagNames FROM osh_book b
LEFT JOIN osh_book_tag bt ON b.id = bt.book_id AND bt.del_flag = 0
WHERE b.price = 0 AND b.del_flag = 0 AND b.status = 0
GROUP BY b.id
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
